name: phonology-features-web
description: Lint config for the web frontend. The runtime bundle is built by web/scripts/build.py and does NOT depend on npm; this file exists solely so npm/eslint can find a project root for the lint job. ``type: module`` lets ``eslint.config.js`` use ESM imports without a Node parse warning; the runtime files themselves (main.js, sw.js) are still loaded as classic scripts by index.html and use no import/export statements.
